title: fraxinus excelsior subsp. coriariifolia
intro: Fraxinus excelsior subsp. coriariifolia, commonly known as Ash, is a subspecies of the European Ash tree native to the Iberian Peninsula. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Fraxinus excelsior subsp. coriariifolia include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various gastrointestinal issues. Fraxinus excelsior subsp. coriariifolia can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and has also been used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
